traitsSeed.name: Analytical & Quantitative Reasoning
traitsSeed.definition: Breaks down complex problems using quantitative logic and evidence.
traitsSeed.rubricPositiveSignals:
Gives concrete examples showing analytical & quantitative reasoning.
Explains decisions with clear, structured reasoning.
Connects outcomes to measurable impact.
traitsSeed.rubricNegativeSignals:
Cannot provide evidence of analytical & quantitative reasoning.
Uses vague claims without specifics.
Struggles to explain tradeoffs or impact.
traitsSeed.rubricFollowUps:
Ask for a specific example.
Probe for measurable results.
traitsSeed.oneLineHook: Show how you bring analytical & quantitative reasoning to real decisions.
